items.title: SMR Stock Rises As NuScale Announces Partnership To Explore AI-Guided Nuclear Fuel Management: Retail Calls It A ‘Real Player’
items.description: NuScale stated that it will explore with ORNL how fuel could be managed even more efficiently and effectively across multiple reactors at a single sit...

items.title: Tesla’s China Retail Sales Slump 45% In January: Report
items.description: The electric vehicle maker’s retail sales in January stood at 18,485 vehicles, its lowest monthly figure since November 2022.

items.title: ZenaTech’s Drone as a Service Opens the 23rd Global Location in Orlando, Fla. to Focus on Government Agencies
Jobless Claims Come In Slightly Higher Than Expectations, Continuing Claims Rise
items.description: According to data released by the U.S. Department of Labor on Wednesday, jobless claims fell by 5,000 to 227,000 in the week ended February 7.
